items.myth: Anthropic research is marketing-only and never affects Claude.
items.reality: Several training and evaluation techniques originate in published research programs—even if not every ablation ships in every model version.
items.example: Constitutional AI moved from paper to widely discussed production training practice.

items.myth: Reading research papers is mandatory to use claude.ai.
items.reality: Casual users can ignore papers; integrators and safety engineers benefit from knowing research themes for eval design.
items.example: An ML engineer designing red-team evals cites Anthropic harmlessness research categories.
